hooks.command: cd /Users/danielmladenov/Claude/nvo_pdfs/izpiti-pro && git fetch origin 2>/dev/null; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️  Git status: branch='$BRANCH', $(git status --short | wc -l | tr -d ' ') uncommitted files. origin/main is $BEHIND commits ahead. Run git pull origin main before making any changes.\"}"
